lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Ah, ikaw pala ang bagong dating. Magandang araw. Ako si Kapitan Rody, barangay captain dito sa Baryo Alon.
lines.english: Ah, so you're the newcomer. Good day. I'm Kapitan Rody, barangay captain here in Baryo Alon.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Dito sa amin, maliit lang ang barangay pero malakas ang samahan. Lahat tumutulong sa isa't isa.
lines.english: Here with us, the barangay is small but the bond is strong. Everyone helps each other.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Pag may kailangan ka, pumunta ka lang sa munisipyo. Nandoon ako madalas — laging may trabaho, alam mo naman.
lines.english: If you need anything, just come to the municipal hall. I'm there often — always work to do, you know.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: At isa pa — kung gusto mong makatulong sa barangay, may mga delivery na kailangan gawin. Interested ka ba?
lines.english: And one more thing — if you want to help the barangay, there are deliveries that need to be done. Are you interested?

choices.tagalog: Opo, Kapitan! Gusto ko pong tumulong!
choices.english: Yes, Captain! I want to help!

choices.tagalog: Salamat po, Kapitan. Iisipin ko po muna.
choices.english: Thank you, Captain. Let me think about it first.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Mabuti at nandito ka. May kailangan akong ipagawa sa iyo.
lines.english: Good that you're here. I have something I need you to do.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Si Aling Nena sa bahay kubo — hindi pa siya nakakain ngayong umaga. Abala kasi sa paglilinis.
lines.english: Aling Nena at the bahay kubo — she hasn't eaten this morning yet. She's been busy cleaning.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Puwede mo bang dalhin ang pandesal na 'to sa kanya? Bumili ka sa tindahan ni Ate Merly, tapos dalhin mo sa kanya.
lines.english: Can you bring this bread to her? Buy it at Ate Merly's store, then bring it to her.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Babayaran kita — bente pesos. Maliit lang, pero tulong na rin sa iyo.
lines.english: I'll pay you — twenty pesos. It's small, but it helps you too.

choices.tagalog: Sige po, Kapitan! Dadalhin ko na po.
choices.english: Sure, Captain! I'll bring it now.

choices.tagalog: Opo, Kapitan. Nasaan po ang bahay ni Aling Nena?
choices.english: Yes, Captain. Where is Aling Nena's house?

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Magaling! Naibigay mo na kay Aling Nena. Mabuti 'yan.
lines.english: Good! You already gave it to Aling Nena. That's good.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Ngayon, may isa pa. Si Padre Miguel sa simbahan — kailangan niya ng kape. Ang tanda na niya, laging inaantok.
lines.english: Now, there's one more. Padre Miguel at the church — he needs coffee. He's so old, always sleepy.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Bumili ka ng kape sa tindahan, tapos dalhin mo sa kanya sa plasa. Bayad ko sa iyo: bente-singko pesos.
lines.english: Buy coffee at the store, then bring it to him at the plaza. My payment to you: twenty-five pesos.

choices.tagalog: Opo, Kapitan! Pupunta na po ako sa simbahan.
choices.english: Yes, Captain! I'll head to the church now.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Napakaparasikap mo naman. Dalawa na ang natapos mo. Mabilis!
lines.english: You're so hardworking. You've finished two already. Fast!

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Ngayon, si Ate Merly naman. Kailangan niya ng bangus para sa ulam ngayong gabi. Walang oras bumili, busy sa tindahan.
lines.english: Now, it's Ate Merly's turn. She needs milkfish for dinner tonight. No time to buy, busy at the store.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Bumili ka sa palengke kay Kuya Jojo, tapos dalhin mo sa kanya. Bayad: apatnapung piso.
lines.english: Buy it at the market from Kuya Jojo, then bring it to her. Payment: forty pesos.

choices.tagalog: Sige po! Sa palengke na po ako!
choices.english: Sure! I'm heading to the market!

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Tatlo na! Kilala ka na ng buong barangay. Mabuti 'yan.
lines.english: Three now! The whole barangay knows you. That's good.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Eto ang susunod: si Kuya Jojo ang nangangailangan ngayon. Kailangan niya ng suka para sa sawsawan.
lines.english: Here's the next one: Kuya Jojo needs something now. He needs vinegar for his dipping sauce.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Bumili ka sa tindahan, dalhin mo sa palengke. Tatlumpung piso ang bayad.
lines.english: Buy it at the store, bring it to the market. Thirty pesos payment.

choices.tagalog: Sige po, Kapitan! Mabilis lang po 'to.
choices.english: Sure, Captain! This will be quick.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Huling delivery na, anak. Pinakamalayo 'to, pero pinakamalaki rin ang bayad.
lines.english: Last delivery, child. This one is the farthest, but the payment is also the biggest.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Si Tatay Andoy sa dalampasigan — kailangan niya ng yelo para sa mga isda niya. Kailangan mapanatiling sariwa.
lines.english: Tatay Andoy at the beach — he needs ice for his fish. They need to stay fresh.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Bumili ka ng yelo, dalhin mo sa dagat. Limampung piso ang bayad. Mabilisan ha — matutunaw ang yelo!
lines.english: Buy ice, bring it to the beach. Fifty pesos payment. Hurry — the ice will melt!

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Natapos mo na lahat. Hindi biro 'yan. Proud ako sa iyo, anak.
lines.english: You've finished everything. That's no joke. I'm proud of you, child.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Alam mo, ang barangay na 'to — hindi lang tungkol sa lugar. Tungkol sa mga tao. At ikaw, parte ka na nito.
lines.english: You know, this barangay — it's not just about the place. It's about the people. And you, you're part of it now.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Kung may kailangan ka pa, nandito lang ako sa munisipyo. Laging bukas ang pinto para sa iyo.
lines.english: If you need anything else, I'm here at the municipal hall. The door is always open for you.

choices.tagalog: Salamat po, Kapitan Rody. Masaya po akong nandito.
choices.english: Thank you, Kapitan Rody. I'm happy to be here.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Magandang umaga. Maaga ka ngayon — maganda 'yan. Ang maaga gumising, maraming nagagawa.
lines.english: Good morning. You're early today — that's good. The early riser gets a lot done.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Pag umaga, gumagala ako sa buong barangay. Tinitingnan kung okay lahat — ang kalsada, ang tulay, ang mga tao.
lines.english: In the morning, I walk around the whole barangay. Checking if everything's okay — the roads, the bridge, the people.

choices.english: Good morning to you too, Captain!

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Gabi na. Ingat ka sa kalsada, madilim dito pag gabi. Konti lang ang poste na may ilaw.
lines.english: It's already night. Be careful on the road, it's dark here at night. Only a few poles have lights.

lines.speaker: kapitan_rody
lines.tagalog: Uwi ka na, ha? Bukas pa ang lahat ng gagawin. Kailangan mo ng pahinga.
lines.english: Go home now, okay? Everything can be done tomorrow. You need rest.

choices.tagalog: Opo, uuwi na po ako. Magandang gabi, Kapitan!
choices.english: Yes, I'll head home now. Good night, Captain!
